org.bytedeco.cuda.cudart.cudaExecutionContext_st

    • Uses of cudaExecutionContext_st in org.bytedeco.cuda.cudart

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      cudaExecutionContext_st cudaKernelNodeParamsV2.ctx()
      Context in which to run the kernel.
      cudaExecutionContext_st cudaMemcpyNodeParams.ctx()
      Context in which to run the memcpy.

      Context in which to run the memset.

      CUDA Execution Context

    • Uses of cudaExecutionContext_st in org.bytedeco.cuda.global

      Methods in org.bytedeco.cuda.global with parameters of type cudaExecutionContext_st 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static int cudart.cudaDeviceGetExecutionCtx(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, int device)
      \brief Returns the execution context for a device Returns in \p ctx the execution context for the specified device.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxDestroy(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx)
      \brief Destroy a execution context Destroys the specified execution context \p ctx.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxGetDevice(int[] device, cudaExecutionContext_st ctx) 
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxGetDevice(IntBuffer device, cudaExecutionContext_st ctx) 
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxGetDevice(IntPointer device, cudaExecutionContext_st ctx)
      \brief Returns the device handle for the execution context Returns in \p *device the handle of the specified execution context's device.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxGetDevResource(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, cudaDevResource_st resource, int type)
      \brief Get context resources Get the \p type resources available to context represented by \p ctx.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxGetId(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, long[] ctxId) 
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxGetId(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, LongBuffer ctxId) 
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxGetId(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, LongPointer ctxId)
      \brief Returns the unique Id associated with the execution context supplied Returns in \p ctxId the unique Id which is associated with a given context.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxRecordEvent(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, CUevent_st event)
      \brief Records an event for the specified execution context Captures in \p event all the activities of the execution context \p ctx at the time of this call.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxStreamCreate(CUstream_st phStream, cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, int flags, int priority)
      \brief Creates a stream and initializes it for the given execution context.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxSynchronize(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx)
      \brief Block for the specified execution context's tasks to complete Blocks until the specified execution context has completed all preceding requested tasks.
      static int cudart.cudaExecutionCtxWaitEvent(cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, CUevent_st event)
      \brief Make an execution context wait on an event Makes all future work submitted to execution context \p ctx wait for all work captured in \p event.
      static int cudart.cudaGraphConditionalHandleCreate_v2(long[] pHandle_out, CUgraph_st graph, cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, int defaultLaunchValue, int flags) 
      static int cudart.cudaGraphConditionalHandleCreate_v2(LongBuffer pHandle_out, CUgraph_st graph, cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, int defaultLaunchValue, int flags) 
      static int cudart.cudaGraphConditionalHandleCreate_v2(LongPointer pHandle_out, CUgraph_st graph, cudaExecutionContext_st ctx, int defaultLaunchValue, int flags)
      \brief Create a conditional handle Creates a conditional handle associated with \p hGraph.
      static int cudart.cudaGreenCtxCreate(cudaExecutionContext_st phCtx, CUdevResourceDesc_st desc, int device, int flags)
      \brief Creates a green context with a specified set of resources.
